sourcesContent:
import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { dashboardAPI, auditoriumAPI } from '../services/api'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer, PieChart, Pie, Cell } from 'recharts'; import { Building2, CalendarCheck, Clock, Users, TrendingUp, CalendarDays } from 'lucide-react'; import './Dashboard.css'; const MONTHS = ['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec']; const STATUS_COLORS = { pending: '#f9a825', approved: '#2e7d32', rejected: '#c62828', cancelled: '#757575', completed: '#0277bd' }; export default function Dashboard() { const { user } = useAuth(); const [stats, setStats] = useState(null); const [auditoriums, setAuditoriums] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); useEffect(() => { Promise.all([dashboardAPI.getStats(), auditoriumAPI.getAll()]) .then(([s, a]) => { setStats(s.data.data); setAuditoriums(a.data.data); }) .finally(() => setLoading(false)); }, []); if (loading) return
Loading dashboard...
; const isAdmin = ['admin','staff'].includes(user?.role); const StatCard = ({ icon, label, value, color, sub }) => (
{icon}
{value} {label} {sub && {sub}}
); return (

{isAdmin ? ( <>
} label="Total Bookings" value={stats?.totalBookings || 0} color="#1a237e" /> } label="Pending Approval" value={stats?.pendingBookings || 0} color="#f9a825" sub="Needs attention" /> } label="Upcoming Events" value={stats?.approvedBookings || 0} color="#2e7d32" /> } label="Total Users" value={stats?.totalUsers || 0} color="#0277bd" /> } label="Auditoriums" value={stats?.totalAuditoriums || 0} color="#6a1b9a" /> } label="This Month" value={stats?.monthlyBookings || 0} color="#e53935" sub="Bookings" />

Bookings Last 6 Months

({ name: MONTHS[m._id.month-1], count: m.count }))}>

Bookings by Status

({ name: s._id, value: s.count }))} cx="50%" cy="50%" innerRadius={50} outerRadius={90} dataKey="value" label={({ name, value }) => `${name}: ${value}`}> {(stats?.bookingsByStatus || []).map((s, i) => ( ))}

Recent Bookings

View All
{(stats?.recentBookings || []).map(b => ( ))}

{b.bookingId} {b.eventName} {b.auditorium?.name} {b.requestedBy?.name}
{b.requestedBy?.department}		 {b.status}
